top_signals.title: Not Even Musk Has The Answer To AI’s Power Shortage
top_signals.summary: The White House issued a stark warning in July 2025: Without $1.4 trillion in new infrastructure investment, electricity prices could surge as much as 58% by 2030. That’s driven mostly by the insatiable power demand from the rise of AI data centers and cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin. According to Axios, new reports show that power demand is set to grow up to 10x between now and 2030. The grid we’ve relied on for decades simply can't keep pace, and that’s threatening to put a major strain on both the AI and Bitcoin booms that have…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Government steps up drive to reconnect young people with £1.6 billion in unclaimed savings

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: The decoy effect — how Beijing steers western mining capital
top_signals.summary: By periodically rattling the sabre of export restrictions, Beijing deliberately keeps geopolitical anxieties at a boil, Nicholas Vafeas writes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
